title: Moosend vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Moosend vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Moosend and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. Moosend is built for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small Businesses Wanting Unlimited Emails At Low Cost
comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Moosend wins for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or Mailgun?
faq.a: Moosend starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
